parameters.name: outputtrimmed
parameters.label: Output Trimmed Section
parameters.description: When Off the output is the spliced and trimmed channels based and on the parameters below. When On the output is the opposite and contains the trimmed out portion of the channels.

parameters.name: direction
parameters.label: Direction
parameters.description: Specify which direction the Start and Trim parameters below work.

parameters.name: start
parameters.label: Start
parameters.description: The position the Trim and Insert operations start from. This will be from the first sample or the last sample in the channel depending on the Direction parameter above.

parameters.name: trimmethod
parameters.label: Trim Method
parameters.description: Gives options for how to set the trim length.

parameters.name: trimlength
parameters.label: Trim Length
parameters.description: The how long the trimmed region is. To output just the trimmed region, switch Output Trimmed Section to On.

parameters.name: insertmethod
parameters.label: Insert Method
parameters.description: Handles how the 2nd input is spliced into the channel.

parameters.name: insertlength
parameters.label: Insert Length
parameters.description: Used to set the length of the inserted data based on the Insert Method above. When set to Trim to Insert Length, the inserted data will be trimmed when this parameter value is shorter than the 2nd inp

parameters.name: insertinterp
parameters.label: Insert Interpolate
parameters.description: Choose interpolation method for stretched insert channel.

parameters.name: match
parameters.label: Match by
parameters.description: Match channels between inputs by name or number.

parameters.name: unmatchedinterp
parameters.label: Unmatched Chan Interpolate
parameters.description: Choose interpolation method for any channels that are unmatched using "Match Channels".

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

examples.label: Configure Start and Trim Length
examples.description: Common settings from 7 real Derivative examples
